name_en: !!️《With full original retail packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double-G accessories add fullness to the design.
name_cn:
!!️《With full original retail packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double-G accessories add fullness to the design.
Light pink quilted V-shaped leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Light pink taffeta lining
Double G
Interior: 12 card slots and 3 coin slip pockets
Full zip coin purse
Model: 837758.
Dimensions: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Color: Light pink full-grain leather.
Made in Italy
